text: A throng of seated people contains mostly suit-wearing Caucasian men with some exceptions here and there, notably two women in the front, one wearing a purple jacket, rear, left, a man with a purple turban, and rear right, a black man with shades.
A captioned photo of cross-country skiers against a large flat surface of snow.
A long cargo train passing over a bridge.
A sign at an intersection with a stop sign and street names.
A girl in a dress is holding a Wii controller.
A very clean kitchen with matching stainless steel oven, microwave, and refrigerator.
A plane sits on a runway on a clear day.
A man in a museum taking a photo of an animal exhibit.
a little car next to a bus and another car on the other side of the bus
A large group of people flying kites on a public field.
